questions.question: Believers are told to run with perseverance while looking to whom?
options: Jesus, the founder and perfecter of faith
questions.correct: Jesus, the founder and perfecter of faith
questions.feedback: Run with endurance looking to Jesus, the founder and perfecter of our faith.

questions.question: The author says God disciplines those he accepts as what?
questions.feedback: God disciplines us as sons — what son is not disciplined by his father?

questions.question: The author says Esau sold his birthright for a single meal.
questions.feedback: Esau sold his inheritance rights for a single meal.

questions.question: Since we are receiving an unshakable kingdom, let us be thankful and worship God with _____ and awe.
questions.feedback: Worship God acceptably with reverence and awe.

questions.question: We are surrounded by a great cloud of _____.
questions.feedback: We are surrounded by a great cloud of witnesses.
